scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:wasm: cargo install wasm-pack && cd wasm && cargo test && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../src/assets/wasm
scripts.server:build: npm run build && cargo build --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml --release --features embed_front
scripts.server:build:linux: npm run build && cargo build --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --features embed_front
scripts.server:build:windows: npm run build && cargo build --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --features embed_front
scripts.server:build:all: npm run server:build:linux && npm run server:build:windows
scripts.server:check:prod: npm run build && cargo check --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml --features embed_front
